posts.author: nnibarra (Nicolas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

I have problems applying my workflow.

I will greatly appreciate if you can help me.

I have a Board X in which each item has a status and a connection with one of various Boards that are within a dossier.

I am trying to create an automation in which an item will be created on the specific Board this item is connected to on the Board X when its status changes.

Hope my explanation is clear enough.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Thank you very much for your time.

posts.author: Amanda115 (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml:
Make sure to link the boards before adding this automation. One of these recipes may help.
